nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-headed oriole
nodes.summary: Green-headed oriole（Oriolus chlorocephalus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Green-headed oriole。

nodes.name: Oriolus
nodes.summary: Oriolus（Oriolus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联31种鸟类，如Dusky-brown oriole、Black-eared oriole、Grey-collared oriole等31种鸟类。

nodes.name: Green-headed oriole
nodes.summary: The green-headed oriole (Oriolus chlorocephalus), or montane oriole, is a species of bird in the family Oriolidae. It is found in eastern Africa. Taxonomy and systematics Subspecies Three subspecies are recognized: O. c. amani - Benson, 1946: Found in south-eastern Kenya and eastern Tanzania O. c. chlorocephalus - Shelley, 1896: Found in Malawi and central Mozambique O. c. speculifer - Clancey, 1969: Found in southern Mozambique Distribution and habitat Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical, dry lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. Behaviour and ecology They feed on fruit, seeds, nectar and insects or insect larvae. Gallery References External links Media related to Oriolus chlorocephalus at Wikimedia Commons Data related to Oriolus chlorocephalus at Wikispecies
